title: teucrium montbretii subsp. heliotropiifolium
intro: Teucrium montbretii subsp. heliotropiifolium is a subspecies of perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Teucrium montbretii subsp. heliotropiifolium include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and promote wound healing. Teucrium montbretii subsp. heliotropiifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oils can be used in aromatherapy.
